title: Update btn-process-uncategorized and btn-process-all handlers to read scope value and send scope field in POST body
description: Update the click handlers for btn-process-uncategorized and btn-process-all to: (1) Read the selected scope value from document.querySelector('input[name="categorization-scope"]:checked').value, (2) Include the scope field in the POST body JSON for /api/process-uncategorized and /api/process-all endpoints. The scope field is additive and optional — existing callers without scope are unaffected.
notes: Scope values: 'withdrawals', 'deposits', 'both'. Backend receives optional scope field. Absent scope → existing behavior (skipDeposits config governs).
